spec_match.rationale: Pristine implementation testing basic scroll promise contracts live, highlighting pre-150 workarounds vs post-150 awaits.

interactive.rationale: Fully interactive: lets the user input target offsets, change behaviors, trigger scrollTo/scrollIntoView, and inspect timed resolution states.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Aligned perfectly with parent details listing.

edge_cases.rationale: Includes neat feature detection routines to safely verify if scrollTo returns an instance of Promise.

references.rationale: Lists the official ChromeStatus entry under references see also block.

design_system.rationale: Beautiful layout employing clear field rows, monospace inputs, and color-coded status lines.
